description_long: This is a large, wall-mounted blackboard with three distinct green writing panels, framed by a metallic border. The central panel is slightly larger and features faint chalk writing, while the two side panels are plain. The frame is metallic, likely aluminum or steel, with a slim, functional design and visible fasteners at the corners. A chalk holder tray is present beneath the central panel, made of the same metallic material as the frame. The writing surface shows some light chalk residue, indicating moderate use, but the overall condition appears well-maintained.
description: A wide, three-panel green blackboard with a metallic frame and a chalk holder tray, showing light chalk marks and moderate use.
description_view_0: Front view of the blackboard showing all three green panels, faint chalk writing on the center, and the metallic frame.
description_view_1: Side profile view, revealing the thinness of the blackboard and the protruding chalk holder tray.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view of the blackboard, with the central panel and chalk holder tray visible, and faint chalk writing.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim profile and the metallic frame's edge.
attribute_frame_design: thin metallic frame, silver color, with visible fasteners and a functional chalk tray
